sanskrit:
यदि ह्यहं न वर्तेयं जातु कर्मण्यतन्द्रितः।
मम वर्त्मानुवर्तन्ते मनुष्याः पार्थ सर्वशः॥
transliteration:
yadi hy ahaṃ na varteyaṃ jātu karmaṇy atandritaḥ |
mama vartmānuvartante manuṣyāḥ pārtha sarvaśaḥ ||
literal_meaning: If ever I did not engage in action with diligence, O Pārtha, all people would follow My path in every way.
contextual_meaning: Krishna warns that personal withdrawal from duty by a respected figure collapses collective morale; modeling inaction seeds systemic disengagement.
psychological_state: Hyper-vigilant responsibility—feeling that one's smallest lapse will unleash chaos, leading to chronic over-functioning and burnout.
trigger_scenario: A team-lead cancels vacation because 'if I take a break the whole project will slack off.'
anchor_text: Your diligent action sets the standard others will follow.
